title: Kitbest Rear View Mirror, 290mm Convex Rearview Mirror Interior Clip on Wide Angle Rear View Mirror to Reduce Blind Spot Effectively for Cars SUV Trucks (290 x 74mm) White
features: Wider View – KITBEST car rear view mirror is 11.4 X 2.9 inches, longer than most of rear view mirrors, which means it will provide you with a wider angle view than others. This wide angle rearview mirror is made of high-quality and high-definition glass, offers you the perfect visibility, eliminating blind spot effectively.
Universal Type – This rear view mirror fits the 50-95 mm original car mirror. Its stretchable-clip design enables it to fit universal vehicles, such as cars, SUV, CRV, Vans and Trucks.

Anti Shake & Anti Splash – The four clips of rear view mirror firmly holds the original car mirror to avoid shaking or even falling off when driving on highway or bumping road. Furthermore, its anti-splash design can prevent broken glass flying out of the frame to hurt you or passenger even if the mirror cracks in accident.

Easy to Install – Finish installing within 15 seconds. This car mirror comes with two adjustable clips. You just need to hook upper clips, put down the lower clips to hold the original rearview mirror tightly, adjust the angle and finish. Easy to install and disassemble.
description: From the brand Previous page Ideal Mirror for Driving Test Strong Bin bags Car Tools & Accessories Useful Bike Tools KITBEST car mirrors are designed as perfect solutions for your safe driving, and constructed with premium glass. We have been working with experts to design and upgrade rearview mirrors, car/bike tools and home essential products. To KITBEST, customers come first. We will keep listening to customers and upgrading our products for the best user experience. Next page
